title: STEBRUAM Hand Sanding Block Set Contoured Profile with Hook and Loop Sanding Pad Hook Backing Plate Convex & Concave Shape for Woodworking Furniture Restoration, Auto Paint and Craft (16-Piece)
features: 16 Convex & Concave Shape: You can get 8 various degrees of concave hand sanding blocks, 6 various degrees of convex，1 rectangles and 1 drop -shaped sanding block, suit for different shape woodworking furniture restoration, auto paint and craft, size: 3.85 inch and 1.57 inch.
Premium PU Back Plate: Hand sanding blocks are made from a sturdy, yet flexible material—polyurethane, which greatly dampens the vibration when sanding.

Hook and Loop Design: Hand sanding block is your first choice as hook and loop sandpaper can be easily attached to, prevented pad shifting and spinning and easily come off from the sanding block when it is time to change paper or grits.

Hand Sanding Blocks with Viscose Cotton: The rectangles sanding pad fit your hands ergonomically. Different shape Hand Sanding Blocks is designed with viscose cottons, which can be used in conjunction with machinery that has hooks for a better feel of use.

Suitable for Many Occasions: Hook and loop sanding block is deal for woodworking, hobby, arts and crafts, auto body, drywall, shop and automotive use. You can contact us as you have any questions or suggestion.
